outcome_record.event_name: UEFA Euro 2028 Qualifier Round 1 — England vs Hungary

prediction.pre_match_note: Euro 2028 qualifier first round. Post-WC2026 fatigue modifier × 0.85. England home — Wembley. New cycle beginning. Qualification phase weight 0.30 (early qualifier). Reduced SMS (70) due to fatigue uncertainty.

calibration_flags.notes: Post-WC2026 qualifier round — new cycle beginning. England quality differential was larger than expected (4-0 vs Hungary = strong motivation signal). Post-tournament fatigue was less significant for a strong team vs weaker opposition. Learning: post-tournament fatigue is less predictive vs significantly weaker opposition — apply to close-quality matchups only.
